summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Funnel Distribution feature (Systeme.io share link workflow). All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend features verified working correctly. The admin workflow for distributing funnel templates to partners is fully functional.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - React hydration warning from select elements. This is a minor issue that doesn't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend GET /api/partner-journey/funnel-distribution/templates returns 4 templates with share links (webinar-evergreen, masterclass-transformation, sales-page-pro, lead-gen-basic)
Backend GET /api/partner-journey/funnel-distribution/all-pending returns pending + delivered + templates correctly
Backend POST /api/partner-journey/funnel-distribution/assign creates new distribution with status 'da_importare'
Backend GET /api/partner-journey/funnel-distribution/{partner_id} returns distributions for specific partner
Backend POST /api/partner-journey/funnel-distribution/update-status advances distribution through 5 statuses
Backend update-status with status='consegnato' and live_url correctly updates funnel_light collection
Route ordering is correct: /all-pending comes BEFORE /{partner_id} to avoid path conflict
Frontend renders summary cards showing counts: In lavorazione, Consegnati, Template
Frontend assign panel shows partner dropdown, template dropdown, notes field, and 'Assegna funnel' button
Frontend distribution card shows partner name, template name, status badge with correct colors
Frontend expanded card shows: 5-step stepper, share link with copy button, live URL section, advance status button, history log
Sidebar shows 'Distribuzione Funnel' under OPERATIVO section in Antonella view
seed_data_creation: Created test distributions during testing: Partner 2 (Arianna Aceto) has 1 distribution (masterclass-transformation, status: consegnato), Partner 3 (Marco Orlandi) has multiple distributions at various statuses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Funnel Distribution feature fully tested. Navigation: Login as admin → Click 'Antonella' tab → Click 'Distribuzione Funnel' in sidebar (under OPERATIVO). Features: 1) Summary cards (In lavorazione, Consegnati, Template), 2) Assign panel with partner/template dropdowns, 3) Filter buttons (In lavorazione/Consegnati), 4) Distribution cards with expandable details, 5) Expanded view shows stepper, share link, live URL, advance button, history. Backend endpoints: GET /templates, GET /all-pending, GET /{partner_id}, POST /assign, POST /update-status. The 5 statuses are: da_importare → importato → personalizzato → live → consegnato. When status='consegnato' with live_url, the funnel_light collection is updated. MOCKED: Systeme.io share links are placeholder URLs (https://systeme.io/share/...).

mocked_apis_list: Systeme.io share links are placeholder URLs (https://systeme.io/share/...) - actual share links will be configured when Systeme.io templates are created
Telegram notification may fail silently if bot token is not configured
